channel.title: Announcing our Partnership with 10up
channel.description:
We are excited to announce our **partnership with 10up**, one of the largest WordPress-centric agencies in the world, to keep pushing our mission of helping people build websites with WordPress and React easily. :muscle:
We're very happy to join forces with such a great team, and believe that their expertise and contributions will have a very positive impact on the project.
**Check out our blog post** to learn more about the reasons behind this partnership and discover 10up's latest contributions to the framework:
https://frontity.org/blog/announcing-our-new-partnership-with-10up/

item.title: Announcing our Partnership with 10up
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
We are excited to announce our partnership with 10up, one of the largest WordPress-centric agencies in the world, to keep pushing our mission of helping people build websites with WordPress and React easily.

We’re very happy to join forces with such a great team, and believe that their expertise and contributions will have a very positive impact on the project.

Check out our blog post to learn more about the reasons behind this partnership and discover 10up’s latest contributions to the framework:

Frontity – 23 Oct 20

Announcing Our Partnership with 10up

We're thrilled to announce our partnership with 10up to keep pushing our mission of helping people build websites with WordPress and React easily.

Read full topic
